title: palicourea duricoria
intro: Palicourea duricoria, also known as the "Red-flowered Palicourea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palicourea duricoria include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
